14th_circuit_court.font: 12-point, proportionally spaced (Times New Roman preferred), or 10-point monospaced (Courier)
14th_circuit_court.line_spacing: Double-spaced body text, single-spaced block quotes and footnotes
caption_requirements: STATE OF MICHIGAN — IN THE 14TH CIRCUIT COURT FOR THE COUNTY OF MUSKEGON
Child referred to by initials only: L.D.W. (MCR 8.119(H))

required_sections: Caption with case number and judge name
motion_format.page_limit: No specific limit for motions in circuit court
motion_format.brief_limit: MCR 2.119(A)(3) — briefs limited to 20 pages unless leave granted
motion_format.exhibits: Attach as separate tabs, numbered sequentially, with exhibit index

efiling.payment: Credit card, debit card, or IFP waiver

service.method: MCR 2.107 — personal service, mail, or electronic (if consented)
service.proof: MCR 2.104 — Proof of Service required on ALL filings
service.timing: Motion + brief served 9 days before hearing (MCR 2.119(C)(1))

caption_requirements: STATE OF MICHIGAN — IN THE COURT OF APPEALS
Lower court: Muskegon County Circuit Court No. 2024-001507-DC
Lower court judge: Hon. Jenny L. McNeill

required_sections: Statement of Facts (with lower court record citations)
Signature block with P-number or pro se designation
brief_format.appendix: Separate volume — judgment, orders, relevant transcript excerpts
brief_format.color_of_cover: Blue for appellant, red for appellee, green for reply

efiling.format: PDF — must be text-searchable (not scanned images)

caption_requirements: STATE OF MICHIGAN — IN THE SUPREME COURT

required_sections: Questions Presented (must be answered 'yes' for each issue)
Table of Contents and Index of Authorities
Argument (why MSC should grant leave — statewide significance)
application_format.key_requirement: Must demonstrate issue of significant public interest or clear error

federal_wdmi.court_name: U.S. District Court — Western District of Michigan
federal_wdmi.applicable_rules: FRCP, Local Rules W.D. Mich., 28 USC §1331, §1983
federal_wdmi.font: 14-point for body text (Local Rule 10.1), 12-point for footnotes
federal_wdmi.line_spacing: Double-spaced body, single-spaced block quotes and footnotes
caption_requirements: UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT — WESTERN DISTRICT OF MICHIGAN — SOUTHERN DIVISION
Emily A. Watson; Hon. Jenny L. McNeill; Pamela Rusco; Ronald T. Berry, Defendants

required_sections: Caption with court name and division
Prayer for Relief (specific damages, injunctive relief)
complaint_format.key_requirement: Must plead 42 USC §1983 elements: (1) person acting under color of state law, (2) deprived constitutional right

efiling.registration: Must register for CM/ECF filing credentials

format_rules: No specific formatting requirements — but professional presentation expected
Letter format OR formal complaint format acceptable
Include specific dates, case numbers, and factual details

submission.address: Judicial Tenure Commission, 3034 W. Grand Blvd, Suite 8-450, Detroit, MI 48202

complaint_sections: Judge identification (Hon. Jenny L. McNeill, 14th Circuit)

universal_rules.child_privacy: MCR 8.119(H) — Use initials L.D.W. ONLY. Never full name in any filing.
universal_rules.signatures: Pro se: 'Andrew James Pigors, Plaintiff, Pro Se' with address and phone
universal_rules.certificate_of_service: Required on EVERY filing — list method, date, recipient
universal_rules.verification: MCR 2.114 — signing certifies reasonable inquiry and good faith basis
universal_rules.redaction: MCR 1.109(D)(9) — redact SSN, DOB (except year), financial accounts
universal_rules.filing_fee_waiver: MCR 2.002 — IFP motion must accompany first filing in each court
